tools.name: search_professionals
tools.title: Search professionals
tools.description: Search active mental-health professionals on Rede Bem-Estar by optional name or profession keyword. Returns public profile fields only.

query.description: Optional keyword matched against display name or profession.

limit.description: Max results to return (default 10, hard cap 25).

tools.name: list_upcoming_group_sessions
tools.title: List upcoming group sessions
tools.description: List upcoming public group sessions (encontros) on Rede Bem-Estar, ordered by start date.

limit.description: Max sessions to return (default 10, hard cap 50).
